question: What text is displayed on the top line at the beginning of the video? A. Happy Halloween!!! B. Halloween Jack o' Lantern C. Silverpsycho78 D. 10-30-2010
How many exclamation marks appear in the orange greeting text shown near the end of the video?
What is the primary color of the large pumpkin sitting on the countertop? A. Green B. Yellow C. Orange D. Red
What entities are present on the countertop and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A large orange pumpkin sits on a beige tiled countertop with dark grout lines. Red carving tools lie on the counter to the left of the pumpkin. A bright orange plastic bowl is positioned to the right of the pumpkin. The cut-off top of the pumpkin rests on the counter near the bowl. A red carving tool is inserted vertically into the top of the pumpkin.

question: How many distinct orange text elements are visible on the screen displaying the date 10-30-2010?

Which of the carving tools is currently inserted into the pumpkin? A. red-handled carving tool with a thin metal blade B. red plastic carving tool with a serrated metal tip C. red plastic tool with a smiley face D. red plastic carving tool with a curved handle

Did the video feature BOTH a bunch of bananas on the counter AND the top of the pumpkin being cut off? A. Only bananas were visible on the counter B. Only the cut pumpkin top was visible on the counter C. Both bananas and the cut pumpkin top were visible on the counter D. Neither bananas nor the cut pumpkin top were visible on the counter
Where are the red-handled carving tools lying on the counter relative to the large orange pumpkin during the carving process?
What action is the person performing with the orange pumpkin? A. scooping seeds B. carving face C. lighting candle D. washing rind
Describe the sequence of events regarding the pumpkin and tools shown in the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, orange title text displays on a black background; at 4s, a large orange pumpkin sits on a beige tiled countertop; at 8s, a red-handled carving tool is stuck vertically into the pumpkin top; at 14s, the cut-off pumpkin top rests on the counter to the right; at 18s, the tool is inserted into the pumpkin side.

question: Has the red-handled carving tool been inserted into the top of the large orange pumpkin yet?

A red tool is inserted but the pumpkin top is still attached C. The top is removed and a hole is carved into the side D. The top is removed but the sides remain smooth without holes
What object is placed inside the carved mouth of the pumpkin?
canonical_answer: A red gummy candy strip is placed to resemble a tongue.

question: Which of these events occurred earliest in the video? A. A red plastic object was sticking out of the pumpkin's carved mouth. B. A large orange pumpkin sat stationary on the tiled countertop. C. The pumpkin had carved triangular eyes and a nose with the mouth partially carved. D. A red-handled carving tool was stuck vertically into the top of the pumpkin.
